name: cerbi-demo-governance
description: Demo governance profile for Cerbi Scanner. Blocks sensitive and credential-like logging patterns before production.

CERBI001.description: Sensitive personal data in structured log fields.

CERBI002.description: Credential, bearer token, or authorization value logged.

CERBI003.description: Raw request body or payload dump logged.

CERBI004.description: Risky object destructuring may leak nested sensitive fields.

CERBI006.description: High-cardinality identifiers used as log dimensions.
